raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehninsch
us to Seewu: Eij Mahjäs / es
gann tewis pehz pawehlefchit.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Teköitiska Seewa
fazzija us to Kehninn: Mans
Kungs Kehninsch/ lai tas Nosee-
guns us man/un us manna Teh-
wa Nammu irr / bet tas Keh-
ninsch un winna Gohda-Krehf-
lis lai paleek nenoseedsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija:
Arrig jeb kas prett tew runna/
tad atwedd winnu pee mannis/
tad winnam tew ne buhs wairs
qiskahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta fazzija: Lai jelle tas
Kehninsch peeminn to KUNGU
tawn Deewu / ka ne tik dauds
Affins-Atreebeju tohp par Mai-
taschanu / ka tee mannu Dehlu
ne nomaita. Tad fazzija wiꞥsch:
Tik teescham ka tas KUNGS
dsihwo/ ne weens no tawa Dehla
Matteein nokrittihs pee Seines.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija ta Seewa:
Laid jelle tawa Kalpone weenu
Wahrdü us mannu Kungu to
Kehnizu runna. Un wiꞥsch faz-
zija: Runna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Seewa fazzija:
Rapehz tad effi tu tahdu Leetu
dohmajs prett teem Deewa Lau-
dim? ka tas Kehninsch fcho Wah-
Du runnajs/ zaur to irr wiꞥsch ta
ka noseedkgs/ tapehz ka tas Keh-
ninsch tawu Atmestu atpakatz
ne atwedd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo niehs uurtin nomirjtim
un buhsfin ka Uhdens / kas pe
Semmes isleets/ ne tohp atta-
fakrahts/ un Deews ne grib t
Dsihwibu atxemt / bet dohma
ka tas / kas atmests irr no win-
na ne tohp arridsan atmests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad es efimu nahku
ar mannu Kungu to Kehnizu sch
Wahrdü runnaht / jo tee Laudi
irr mann isbeedejscht : Tape-
fazzija tawa Kalpone / es runna
fchu jelle us to Kehnizu / jaſch-
tas Kehninsch darrihs/ ko winna
Kalpone fatka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas Kehninsch klaufihs
ispestidams fawu Kalpont no t
Wihra Rohkas / kas aprnehmee
mann un mannu Dehlu kohp
no Deewa eemantojanas Teefa
isdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tawa Kalpone dohma
ja/ manna Kunga ta Kehnins
Wahrs buhs man par Eepree-
zinaschanu/ jo mans Kungs ta
Kehninsch irr ka weens Deew
Engelis / klaustidams labbu u
faunu/ tapehz buhs tas KUNG
taws Deews ar tewim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja tas Ke-
ninsch/ un fazzija us to Seewu
Ne flepp jelle man to Leetu /
es tew waizaschu. Un ta Seew
fazzija: Runna jelle mans Kung
Kehninsch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch fazzija
Neggi Joaba Rohka ar tewi-
irr witäs schinnis Leetas ? ta-
atbildeja ta Seewa/ un fazzija
Tik teescham ka tawa Dwehfe
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
